title: Simple Life Series Modpack
description: Modpack using Mat0u5's Life Series! mod which is based on Grians youtube series
body:
Welcome to the Simple Life Series Modpack. This was made to make distributing the Life Series! mod plus some other mods (including performance and QOL) a bit easier. Credits to [Mat0u5](https://modrinth.com/mod/life-series), the creator of the Life Series! mod and [Grain + his friends + his developers](https://www.youtube.com/@Grian) for the oringinal concepts.

This pack includes the following major mods

- Life Series!
- Simple Voice Chat (With speaking distance of 30 and whispering of 12 blocks)
- LambDynamicLights
- Zoomify

<details>
<summary>Full List</summary>

- AppleSkin
- Chat Heads
- Controlling
- CraterLib
- Cubes Without Borders
- Dynamic FPS
- EntityCulling
- Fabric API
- Fabric Language Kotlin
- FerriteCore
- LambDynamicLights
- Life Series
- Lithium
- Mod Menu
- More Chat History
- Mouse Tweaks
- No Chat Reports
- Placeholder API
- Reese's Sodium Options
- Searchables
- Simple RPC
- Simple Voice Chat
- Sodium
- Sodium Extra
- YetAnotherConfigLib
- Zoomify

</details>
